data.name: Slave Secretary
data.detailed_description:
Slave Secretary is an adult game that features mini games and RPG elements combined with sexual content portrayed in the visual novel style. 

You play as a Hunter, who hunts monster for parts, known as Monzema, that are valuable but can only be sold by those licensed. One day, while selling Monzema in the black market, you see a beautiful woman being sold as a slave in the auction. The auctioneers hints to you that this woman used to be the former CEO of a large company dealing with Monzema and is licensed to sell it. You win her at the auction and make a deal with her. If she serves you well, you'll help her get revenge for the people that caused her to be enslaved. 

The story's plot is centered around training your new secretary to be submissive to you, while earning Monzema by hunting monsters and having her deal with the business aspect of your company. Both parts respectively feature progressive mini games featuring upgrades to skills and perks.

As the story progresses, you will even encounter Corporate Battles, which are when corporations send drones to attack and raid your business convoys. You cannot control your drones, but you can upgrade them and see how they perform against the enemy. As your drones get stronger, there will be opportunities to perform attacks and raids yourself, which is a key part of the story in your quest to help your secretary get her revenge.

The Game Features:

Monzema Hunting - This is a progressive mini game where you move to collect Monzema from Slime Monsters in a given step count. In the beginning you'll have only a few steps to take with limited number of slimes to hunt, but as you earn more Monzema and convert it to Money, you can upgrade various perks to help you more effectively farm Monzema.

Business Dealing - This is a progressive mini game where in a time limit, you have to collect Suitcases. Not only will you be facing time constraints, there will be rival agents that try to get in your way and stop you. Fortunately, you can upgrade various perks to help you.

Drone Battles - Drone battles are autobattle idlers that occur at specific events in the game. You'll have to upgrade your drone, so that it can defeat the rival drones, which not only progresses the plot, but may offer you precious loot to help fund your operations. 

NSFW Scenes - These events occur naturally as the plot progresses. Watch as the hesitant secretary learns to be a submissive and lusty slave for you through your training. Help her get her revenge and earn her affection and loyalty.

data.short_description: Slave Secretary is an adult game that features mini games and RPG elements combined with sexual content portrayed in the visual novel style.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
